positive: A symmetrical, intricate celestial map design featuring glowing nebulae, stylized mythical flora (like luminescent ferns and orchids), and geometric astronomical constellations. The composition should be centered and suitable for repeat pattern placement on fabric. Style should be neo-art deco mixed with bioluminescent fantasy, executed with deep midnight blues, iridescent purples, teal accents, and vibrant gold leaf accents. High contrast, clean vector aesthetic with subtle, glowing gradients. The main elements must have clear, sharp silhouettes against a dark background, creating a mystical, dreamlike, and majestic atmosphere. Concept: Cosmic Woodland Guardian. Ideal for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, out of focus, artifacts, grain, noise, watermark, text, logo, signature, sloppy, poorly drawn, asymmetrical, low detail, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, muted colors, grunge, low contrast
